Who We Are

Your One-Stop Agency in the Heart of Limbe

WICS Agency has been serving the Limbe community for over nine years with a wide range of professional services. Located conveniently beside the Port Authority Office in Mokundange, we are your go-to solution for documentation, subscriptions, insurance, shipping, and much more.

  • Over 9 years of trusted service
  • Friendly, knowledgeable staff
  • Fast and efficient processing
  • Affordable and transparent pricing
Learn More About Us
What We Offer

Our Core Services

Everything you need in one convenient location. Our experienced team is ready to assist you.

Documentation Services

Professional handling of all your official documents, permits, certificates and administrative paperwork.

Learn more

CANAL+ & DStv Subscriptions

Fast subscription activation and renewal for CANAL+, DStv and StarTimes – all in one convenient place.

Learn more

Flight Ticket Sales

Book domestic and international flights quickly and at competitive prices with our experienced team.

Learn more

AXA Motor Insurance

Protect your vehicle with AXA insurance plans – comprehensive coverage at great rates.

Learn more

DHL Express Services

Send and receive packages worldwide with DHL's trusted express shipping. Fast, trackable, reliable.

Learn more

CAMTEL BLUE SIM

Purchase and recharge your CAMTEL BLUE SIM for affordable national calls and internet data.

Learn more
View All Services

Ready to Get Started?

Visit us at Mokundange, Limbe or give us a call. We're open Monday to Saturday, 8 AM – 6 PM.

Call: 699 94 90 35 WhatsApp Now Get Directions
